description: Diagnose Airflow failures from UI links with bounded logs and optional recovery actions.
name: io.github.madamak/apache-airflow-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Airflow instance.
environmentVariables.name: AIRFLOW_MCP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token. Provide this or both username and password; it takes precedence when set.
environmentVariables.name: AIRFLOW_MCP_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Basic-auth username. Required with password when token is omitted.
environmentVariables.name: AIRFLOW_MCP_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Basic-auth password. Required with username when token is omitted.
environmentVariables.name: AIRFLOW_MCP_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: The directory install uses the Airflow 3 client. See the README for Airflow 2 setup.
environmentVariables.name: AIRFLOW_MCP_API_VERSION

environmentVariables.description: Expose only read tools unless write access is deliberately selected.
environmentVariables.name: AIRFLOW_MCP_READ_ONLY

title: Incident Response MCP for Apache Airflow
